Pronunciation Activities

Choose an activity below to practise your English pronunciation. Each activity has fun exercises with sound, clear instructions, and large buttons. Take your time and enjoy learning.

How to use this page: tap or click any tile to open that activity. It will open right here on this same page. When you finish, press the "Back to all activities" button at the top to choose another one.
